name: Orphan Drug Credit

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be testing a drug designated under section 526 of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act for a disease affecting fewer than 200,000 people in the US.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A 25% tax credit for qualified clinical testing expenses incurred in the development of drugs for rare diseases or conditions.
